productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Check Multi Color Shirt
description: CompositionMulti-coloured checked t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a V-neck band collar leading to a complete front placket with branded buttons, elbow length sleeves with flaps, two flap pockets on either side of the chestFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Don that completely casual look in this brown, grey, black and lilac checked t-shirt from wrangler. The band collar with a deep V-neck leading to a buttoned up placket and the elbow-length sleeves with flaps to hold rolled up sleeves in place enhance the street-fashion factor. The front two flapped chest pockets and the rounded hemline create a casual style statement. Team this with jeans and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
